title: World's Largest Green Hydrogen Plant Underway in PiauÃ­, Brazil
content: With an initial investment of R$27 billion, the project is a pioneer on an industrial scale in the world and consolidates PiauÃ­ as one of the most promising territories in the global chain of clean fuels. The plant will produce 400 thousand tons of green hydrogen and 2.2 million tons of green ammonia per year at its full capacity, meeting the growing demand from Europe and other markets for sustainable energy alternatives.
author: Analysts Account
